New Metric Launch: Options Max Pain (Time Series)

Max Pain is the strike price at which the total value of expiring options (calls + puts) is minimized, theoretically maximizing losses for option holders.

My exact workflow for shipping a mobile app in ONE day:

→ Plan everything inside Claude (features, user flow, edge cases)
→ Take the docs from Claude straight into Rork
→ Build the UI first, get it working
→ Decide if you even NEED a backend at this stage (most MVPs don't)
